Industry

Some work at the Molecular Sciences Institute is supported by grants from Hoechst Marion Roussel, Inc., and Lynx Therapeutics, Inc. The protein interaction database is housed in the Informix Universal Server, which was given to TMSI via a grant from Informix. The Institute was seeded by a one-time, "no-strings" grant to Sydney Brenner from the Philip Morris Companies, Inc. Institute members maintain active ties to biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and other industries.
  • Hoechst Marion Roussel
  • Informix
  • Lynx
    3832 Bay Center Place 
    Hayward, CA 94545
